info.title: Rentalot API
info.description:
REST API for Rentalot -- an AI-powered rental agent platform that manages inquiry response, showing scheduling, messaging, and follow-ups across WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS, and Gmail.

## Authentication
All endpoints require a Bearer token (API key) in the `Authorization` header. Generate API keys in the Rentalot dashboard under Settings > API Keys. Keys are prefixed with `ra_`.

```
Authorization: Bearer ra_your_api_key_here
```

## Rate Limits
Every response includes rate limit headers:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit` -- max requests per minute for your tier
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining` -- requests remaining in the current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset` -- Unix timestamp when the window resets
- `X-RateLimit-Resource` -- which resource the request counted against

When rate limited (HTTP 429), a `Retry-After` header indicates seconds to wait.

### Per-Tier Limits
| Tier | Global RPM | Daily Requests | Write Access | Max Page Size | API Keys | Webhooks |
|------|-----------|----------------|--------------|---------------|----------|----------|
| Free Trial | -- | -- | No | -- | 0 | 0 |
| Starter ($29/mo) | 30 | 5,000 | Read-only | 50 | 2 | 0 |
| Pro ($79/mo) | 120 | 50,000 | Full CRUD | 100 | 5 | 10 |
| Scale ($199/mo) | 600 | 500,000 | Full + Priority | 200 | 20 | 50 |

Write operations (POST, PATCH, DELETE) are only available on Pro and Scale tiers. Starter tier has read-only API access. Free Trial has no API access.

### Per-Resource Write Limits (Pro / Scale)
| Resource | WPM | Daily Writes | Monthly Writes |
|----------|-----|-------------|----------------|
| Properties | 20 / 60 | 200 / 1,000 | 5,000 / 25,000 |
| Contacts | 15 / 40 | 150 / 500 | 3,000 / 10,000 |
| Showings | 10 / 30 | 100 / 300 | 2,000 / 5,000 |
| Messages | 5 / 15 | 50 / 200 | 500 / 3,000 |
| Drafts | 10 / 30 | 50 / 200 | 1,000 / 5,000 |
| Follow-ups | 5 / 15 | 30 / 100 | 500 / 2,000 |
| Workflows | 5 / 15 | 30 / 100 | 500 / 2,000 |
| Webhooks | 5 / 10 | 20 / 50 | 200 / 500 |

## Pagination
All list endpoints support pagination with `page` (1-indexed) and `limit` (max 100) query parameters. Responses include a `pagination` object with `page`, `limit`, `total`, and `totalPages`.

## Errors
Errors follow a consistent format with a machine-readable `code` and human-readable `message`. Validation errors (422) include a `details` array with per-field messages.

## Idempotency
POST endpoints support the `Idempotency-Key` header to prevent duplicate operations. Use a unique UUID for each request. Repeated requests with the same key return the original response.

## Webhooks
Subscribe to real-time events (inquiry.created, message.received, showing.booked, etc.) via webhook subscriptions. Payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 -- verify using the `X-Webhook-Signature` header and your webhook secret.

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: Manage rental property listings. CRUD operations for the property portfolio.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Create, view, and update prospect/tenant contacts.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Read-only access to messaging conversations and their message history.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Read-only access to all calendar events (showings, calls, inspections, meetings).

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Send messages to contacts via their preferred channel.

tags.name: Drafts
tags.description: Create, edit, and send draft messages. Drafts auto-expire after 24 hours.

tags.name: Follow-ups
tags.description: Schedule automated follow-up messages for contacts.

tags.name: Workflows
tags.description: View workflow templates and manage workflow runs (automated multi-step sequences).

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Subscribe to real-time event notifications via HTTPS webhooks.

tags.name: Property Images
tags.description: Upload, manage, and reorder property listing images via Cloudflare R2.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: View and review pre-screening sessions (prospect submissions from public chat workflows).

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Manage agent preferences, email notification settings, and follow-up automation configuration.

BearerAuth.description: API key as Bearer token. Generate keys in the Rentalot dashboard under Settings > API Keys. Keys are prefixed with `ra_`. Include as `Authorization: Bearer ra_...` header.

monthlyRent.description: Monthly rent in whole dollars (USD cents not supported)

availabilityDate.description: ISO 8601 date when the property becomes available (YYYY-MM-DD)

status.description: Current property status. 'active' = listed and visible to prospects.

description.description: Free-text property description shown to prospects

ownerId.description: Optional reference to the property owner contact record

phone.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format

status.description: Contact lifecycle stage. 'prospect' = new inquiry, 'scheduled' = has a showing booked, 'applicant' = applied, 'renter' = active tenant, 'archived' = closed.

channel.description: Channel the conversation is on (whatsapp, telegram, sms, gmail)

lastMessageAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent message

channel.description: Channel the message was sent/received on

sentAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was sent

status.description: Showing lifecycle status. 'pending' = awaiting confirmation, 'confirmed' = both parties confirmed.

type.description: Event type. 'showing' = property viewing, 'call' = phone/video call, 'inspection' = property inspection, 'meeting' = general meeting.

content.description: The message body that was sent

channel.description: Channel the message was delivered through

sentAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was sent

propertyId.description: Optional property context for the draft

status.description: Draft lifecycle status. 'pending' = editable, 'sent' = delivered, 'expired' = auto-expired (drafts expire after 24 hours).

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the follow-up will be sent

status.description: Follow-up lifecycle. 'pending' = scheduled and waiting, 'processing' = currently being sent, 'sent' = delivered, 'cancelled' = manually cancelled, 'failed' = delivery failed.

slug.description: URL-safe slug for public chat links

description.description: Workflow description shown on the public chat landing page

isActive.description: Whether this workflow can accept new runs

isPublic.description: Whether this workflow is accessible via the public chat URL (/p/{slug}/{workflowSlug})

slug.description: URL-safe slug for public chat links

steps.description: Ordered array of workflow step definitions

exitConditions.description: Conditions that end a workflow run

questionConfig.description: Question display/validation config for OQAAT form

isActive.description: Whether this workflow can accept new runs

isPublic.description: Whether accessible via public chat URL

templateId.description: Workflow template this run was created from

propertyId.description: Optional property context for property-scoped workflows

status.description: Run lifecycle. 'pending' = queued, 'running' = actively executing steps, 'paused' = waiting for contact reply, 'completed' = all steps done, 'cancelled' = manually stopped, 'failed' = error occurred.

currentStepIndex.description: Zero-based index of the step currently being executed

messagesSent.description: Total messages sent during this run

exitReason.description: Why the run ended (null if still active)

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run finished (null if still active)

url.description: HTTPS endpoint that receives webhook payloads

events.description: Event types this webhook subscribes to. Available events: inquiry.created (new prospect inquiry), message.received (inbound message from contact), message.sent (outbound message to contact), showing.booked (new showing scheduled), showing.cancelled (showing cancelled), contact.updated (contact record changed), property.updated (property record changed), workflow.completed (workflow run finished), workflow.created (new template created), workflow.updated (template modified), workflow.deleted (template removed).

active.description: Whether the webhook is currently delivering events

lastDeliveredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful delivery

lastFailedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last failed delivery attempt

secret.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Only returned once at creation time -- store it securely. Use it to verify webhook payloads via the X-Webhook-Signature header.

content.description: Message content containing the search term

contactName.description: Name of the contact in the conversation

url.description: Public URL for the image (served via Cloudflare Image Transformations)

workflowTemplateId.description: Workflow template used for this session

submission.description: Collected answers from the pre-screening form (key-value pairs)

status.description: Session lifecycle. 'active' = in progress, 'completed' = all steps done, 'expired' = timed out (30 days), 'draft' = partial data from voice screening.

reviewStatus.description: Agent review status. 'pending_review' = awaiting agent decision, 'approved' = prospect accepted, 'denied' = prospect rejected.

reviewNotes.description: Optional notes from the agent's review

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was reviewed

notifyProspectOnReview.description: Email prospect when application is reviewed

agentName.description: Display name for the AI agent

customInstructions.description: Custom instructions for the AI agent

defaultShowingDuration.description: Default showing duration in minutes (30, 45, or 60)

publicChatIntro.description: Custom intro message for public chat

profilePublic.description: Whether the agent profile page is public

followupIdleHours.description: Hours of inactivity before follow-up (24, 48, or 72)

followupMaxSteps.description: Max follow-up messages in a sequence (1-3)

voiceFirstMessage.description: Custom first message for voice agent

allowInternationalPhone.description: Accept international phone numbers in pre-screening

externalLinkUrl.description: External link URL for public pages

externalLinkLabel.description: Label for the external link button

showExternalLinkOnProfile.description: Show external link on agent profile page

showExternalLinkOnCompletion.description: Show external link on completion screen

callHumanEnabled.description: Show call button on public pages

followupTemplates.description: User-defined follow-up message templates. When set, skip LLM generation for that step.

idleHours.description: Hours of inactivity before sending a follow-up

maxSteps.description: Maximum follow-up messages in a sequence

post.description: Use to add a new rental property listing to the authenticated tenant's portfolio. Provide at minimum the address, monthly rent, bedrooms, and bathrooms. The property is created with status 'active' by default (configurable via the `status` field). Side effects: increments daily/monthly write counters. Requires Pro or Scale tier for API write access. Rate limit: Pro 20 WPM / 200 daily / 5,000 monthly; Scale 60 WPM / 1,000 daily / 25,000 monthly.
